title: Park Compass
dataDesc: An interactive web app featuring personalized AI-generated park itineraries, dashboards, and trip documentation.

title: Undergraduate Researcher — UTD Computer Science
dataDesc: Conducted Entanglement Assisted Quantum Error Correction Research - arXiv Preprint 2026.

title: Data Science Lead - Tweet Analysis for Disaster Crisis Response
dataDesc: Developed a near real-time crisis detection system using the Bluesky API, benchmarking LLMs to classify 25K+ disaster-related posts.

title: Project Lead - Quantum Machine Learning for Leukemia Genomics
imgAlt: Quantum Machine Learning for Leukemia Genomics
dataDesc: Engineered quantum and classical ML models to classify leukemia subtypes from gene-expression data.

title: Inaugural Texas Quantum Summit
dataDesc: Attended the first ever Texas Quantum Summit, engaging with senators, startup founders, and researchers on quantum's role in driving economic growth, especially with regards to cross-sector collaboration in response to Texas Senate Bill 2827 which went into effect September 1, 2025.

title: Communications Specialist - UTD Art Sci Lab
dataDesc: Drove Lab engagement via strategic marketing, event coordination, and data-driven proposals.

title: Simulation Lead - Comet Rocketry
dataDesc: Designed & launched a high-powered rocket, leading flight simulations and 6-DOF analyses to optimize performance at the 2024 IREC competition at Spaceport America.

title: Solidworks: 3DEXPERIENCE World 2024
dataDesc: Attended 3DEXPERIENCE World 2024 as a member of UTD's AIAA group, showcasing student projects at an EDU booth engaging with engineers and designers.

title: IEEE Quantum Week
dataDesc: Attended my first conference, IEEE Quantum Week, as a UTD Quantum Connect program participant, engaging with researchers, engineers, and entrepreneurs while exploring quantum algorithms, simulations, networking, hardware, and more.

title: SWE/EQCI Intern - bp/QxQ
dataDesc: Implemented key algorithms (QKD, Grover's, QAOA, VQE), and collaborated with bp to explore hybrid quantum-classical solutions for energy optimization.
